emails.subject: tolling
emails.body: Hi Dale, Did you just do a tolling agreement re: LV? I'm looking for forms, and thought I'd check. Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: RE: tolling
emails.body: Here is a copy of the agreement, made all the more ugly by my redaction "surgery." I have put some terms that you will want to think through carefully in italics. I totally removed some other provisions that were particularly deal-specific (e.g. an obligation to offer to sell them the project if we decided to abandon it--I know, it's damn weird, but they were hung up on some strange things). Let me know if I can answer any questions. To: Rasmussen, Dale
